projects.title: Smart Garbage Reporting System
projects.desc: A web platform where users can upload garbage images and report issues directly to authorities.
projects.longDesc: A complete crowdsourced civic application designed to streamline waste management. Citizens can take photos of public litter, automatically tag their location, and submit reports. Authorities access a dedicated dashboard displaying an interactive map heatmap to optimize cleanup routes and track task completion.
features: Secure image uploading and optimization in the cloud
Interactive admin dashboard with real-time analytics
Task assignment system and status update triggers

projects.title: Modern Gym Website
projects.desc: A modern fitness website with responsive UI and smooth scrolling animations.
projects.longDesc: An immersive landing page and club management UI designed to maximize gym memberships. Features high-end modern layout styles, glassmorphic dynamic pricing cards, class schedule timetables, and an interactive BMI calculator utility.
features: Highly responsive layouts tailored for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Dynamic filtering schedules for gym sessions
Polished contact forms with hover state transitions

projects.title: Interactive Portfolio Website
projects.desc: Personal portfolio showcasing developer projects, certifications, and active timelines.
projects.longDesc: The very portfolio you are browsing! Built as a clean, highly customized developer showcase featuring a high-performance particle canvas background, a vertical milestone career tracker, and responsive modal lightboxes for detailed content viewing.
features: Custom responsive CSS variables and ambient lighting blobs
Smooth scroll-spy navigation tracking scrolling position
Frosted-glass details modals for certificate and project galleries
